_note: One main quest per chapter. Required steps drive progression; optional steps add investigations without blocking completion. Flags come from dialog set_flag, room interactions/on_enter_flag, grants/pickups (granted_/took_), and cracked databases (cracked_<id>).

q01_the_smoke.name: The Smoke
q01_the_smoke.desc: Learn the shape of Swain's house, keep Colin close, and take the measure of the woman with mirrors for eyes.

steps.text: Audit the journey your father arranged.
Present yourself to Swain.
Read Swain's study as an account book.
Consult Colin in private.
Learn the house's rhythms from Petal.
Meet Sally Shears.
Walk Portobello market with Sally.
Follow Sally's invisible security drill.

q02_the_count_arrives.name: The Count Arrives
q02_the_count_arrives.desc: Take Kid Afrika's cargo: a comatose man wired to a gray slab. Get him stable, get answers, get ready.

steps.text: Inventory the Judge's old wounds.
Hear Kid Afrika's terms.
Trace the route hidden in Kid's delivery.
Move the Count into the Factory.
Let Cherry rig her monitors.
Face Gentry about the arrangement.
Hear what Gentry thinks the slab is.
Map the evidence behind Gentry's Shape.

q03_the_offer.name: The Offer
q03_the_offer.desc: Eddy's found a suit with serious money and no explanations. Find out what's being bought before it's you.

steps.text: Read Eddy's paper empire on the squat wall.
Work the strip one more night.
Listen past the strip's commercial noise.
Hear Eddy's pitch back at the squat.
Meet Prior at the bar.
Ride Angie's stim and dream the other life.
Leave Florida with Prior.
Audit what Prior purchased before meeting you.

q04_the_silence.name: The Silence
q04_the_silence.desc: The loa are gone from your dreams and the network is glad. Find the edges of the quiet.

steps.text: Find the surveillance shadow in the Malibu house.
Read what the perfect house cannot hide.
Get through the morning with Porphyre.
Take Hilton Swift's call.
Question Continuity about the constructs.
Probe Continuity's missing seconds.
Search your dreams on the beach at dusk.
Decide: fly east for the Sprawl shoot.

q05_the_finn.name: The Oracle of Lost Technology
q05_the_finn.desc: Sally is taking you to consult a dead man. Listen well: oracles bill by the truth.

steps.text: Read the lives inside Sally's travel wallet.
Fly to the Sprawl with Sally.
Find the alley shrine.
Catalog the offerings at the dead man's shrine.
Hear the Finn read Sally's past.
Hear who is squeezing Sally — and from where.
Walk back through the snow with Sally.
Compare the two kinds of ghost traveling with you.

q06_the_face.name: The Work
q06_the_face.desc: The clinic has your consent forms and somebody else's face. Survive the week. Keep Mona underneath.

steps.text: Search the identity packet beneath the van seat.
Check in under a name that isn't yours.
Ask Gerald what, exactly, is being done.
Read the face ordered from Gerald.
Press Prior about Eddy.
Go under.
Face the mirror.
Inventory what the surgeons could not replace.

q07_the_count_dreams.name: The Count Dreams
q07_the_count_dreams.desc: Gentry means to read the aleph through the Count's tap. Hold the line and meet what lives inside.

steps.text: Name the Investigators you still remember building.
Help Cherry stabilize the Count.
Hear Gentry's aleph cosmology.
Audit the stolen power feeding the aleph.
Jack in through the Count's tap.
Speak with the boy in the gray house.
Trace the second intelligence inside the aleph.
Learn what the aleph is costing the Count.

q08_brigitte.name: The Loa's Price
q08_brigitte.desc: Stop taking the network's dust. Jack the lace raw. Ask the silence who bought it.

steps.text: Audit the network's medication schedule.
Palm the dose and keep Piper convinced.
Review the dreams in the jet's dark.
Test the blind spot Porphyre left you.
Jack the lace and cross the wall.
Hear Mamman Brigitte's accounting.
Read the aircraft's shadow manifest.
Order the flight plan east.

q09_flight.name: Underground
q09_flight.desc: Swain's house has become a market and you are on the shelf. Get to Tick's. Warn Sally.

steps.text: Reconstruct how Swain's house changed hands.
Overhear Swain's accounting.
Slip the house with Colin.
Cross London by Underground.
Learn the crowd's oldest security system.
Reach Tick's flat in Brixton.
Let Tick show you Colin's forbidden switch.
See the aleph macroform on Tick's rig.
Get the warning through to Sally.

q10_the_switch.name: The Switch
q10_the_switch.desc: You're the double. The plan is the garage. Be the first one to stop following the plan.

steps.text: Measure the differences the clinic left behind.
Walk the rehearsal like a good little ghost.
Map the Envoy's camera choreography.
Work out what the job really is.
Overhear what Prior promised the crew.
Be in the garage when the mark arrives.
Survive the switch going sideways.
Get in the car.

q11_the_siege.name: The Siege of Dog Solitude
q11_the_siege.desc: 3Jane's muscle wants the aleph. Introduce them to your art.

steps.text: Spot the convoy from the catwalk.
Wire the yard defenses with Gentry.
Trace who bought battle parts before you.
Assign the machines their fields of fire.
Keep Cherry and the Count secure.
Loose the Judge.
Hold the yard.
Read the battle in its wreckage.
Let the mirror-eyed woman in.

q12_the_wedding.name: The Wedding
q12_the_wedding.desc: Everything the loa promised converges on a gray box in a torchlit factory. Choose.

steps.text: Match the Factory to the geography of your dreams.
Stand where the dreams said to stand.
Read the four lives gathered at the Factory.
Hear Mona out — the girl in your face.
Take Molly's blessing, such as it is.
Measure the cost of Bobby's new world.
Enter the aleph.
Put 3Jane to rest.
Marry the boy at the crossroads.
